## Summary

- 

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm check:adapters`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm coverage`
- [ ] `pnpm smoke`
- [ ] `pnpm check:package`
- [ ] `pnpm docs:build`

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, source maps, local paths, or customer/workspace data are committed.
- [ ] Adapter risk metadata is accurate for changed commands.
- [ ] External/destructive commands require explicit confirmation.
